subject: LU-17646 llapi: lustreapi: add FID in error messages

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

parents.subject: LU-17841 kfilnd: Race between hello and tagged RMA

commit.subject: LU-17646 llapi: lustreapi: add FID in error messages
commit.message:
LU-17646 llapi: lustreapi: add FID in error messages

Use llapi_fd2fid() to print FID in llapi_lease_set() and
llapi_lease_check() error messages.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Alexandre Ioffe <aioffe@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Iac97ea721860652e304c674007ac7646d183e2fd
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55074
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
